title: rubus milliformis
intro: Rubus milliformis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus milliformis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Rubus milliformis typically involve drying the leaves and fruits, and then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
